requirements_added.title: ConPTY transport and recovery Settings contract
Priority-aware WebSocket safe-send under output flood
Byte-aware replay tail and screen repair overflow recovery
Frontend recovery write gate and queued input release barrier
ConPTY input-lag recovery telemetry and soak evidence

notable_requirements_decisions: Wave6 Settings exclusion is treated as a prior scoped completion record; FR-BGSTAB-015 is a later ConPTY-specific extension.
Default wsSendMode remains direct until observe/enforce evidence supports rollout.
Server safe-send requirements cover server-sent recovery ordering; queued input release is owned by FR-BGSTAB-017.
ConPTY redraw-flood E2E at https://localhost:2222 is mandatory final validation, while bash, WSL, and long-duration browser memory gaps may remain operational validation.
No silent fallback from ConPTY/Codex sessions to winpty, pipe, or another PTY backend is allowed as a workaround.
